cases.note: test: embeds the diff into the base prompt, no suffix
cases.expected:
You are generating a single git commit message.
Read the staged diff below and produce the message.

Rules:
- First line: imperative mood, <= 72 chars, no trailing period.
- Optional body: blank line, then wrapped at 72 chars explaining WHY.
- Output ONLY the commit message - no preamble, no code fences, no quotes.
- Do not include "Co-authored-by" trailers - Orca appends them after generation when configured.

Staged diff:
```diff
diff --git a/foo b/foo
+hello
```

cases.note: test: trims whitespace
test: strips a single enclosing fenced code block
test: strips a fenced block with a language tag
test: drops a leading 'Generating' preamble line
test: normalizes CRLF line endings
test: strips a leading bullet list marker
cases.input: ● Add Copilot entry to agent results
cases.expected: Add Copilot entry to agent results

cases.note: test: strips a leading numbered list marker
test: whitespace-only input yields empty string
edge: empty string stays empty
edge: already-clean subject unchanged
edge: drops a leading 'Thinking...' preamble line
edge: drops a lone ellipsis preamble line
edge: strips a leading dash list marker
edge: strips a leading star list marker
edge: strips a paren-numbered list marker
edge: 'Generated' is not the preamble word, line kept
edge: multiline fenced block content preserved
edge: CRLF inside fence normalized then stripped
edge: non-enclosing fence is left untouched
edge: list marker stripped, following body kept
edge: dash without a trailing space is not a marker
edge: number without . or ) is not a marker
edge: preamble line then fenced block
edge: empty fenced block yields empty string
